title: [Deep Freeze, Cave of Ice]
description: There is scarcely enough room to move about in this frightfully cold recess.  Yet, it is evident that something ventures into this tiny area.  Your breath forms a frosty mist as you shudder violently at the thought of being trapped in this confining space.

wayto.3476: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'south'
